message:
feat(ffs-fuse): harden mount validation and fix stale readahead after writes

Add write-path readahead cache invalidation to prevent serving stale
prefetched bytes after successful writes (bd-1fb8). Consolidate
mountpoint preflight validation into a shared helper that rejects empty,
non-existent, and non-directory paths for mount, mount_background, and
mount_managed (bd-1z6n, bd-2dsa). Includes targeted tests for all new
behavior. Update beads issue tracker accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
